chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-1838 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 20-5-2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahesar, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G along with Zulfiqar Ali Shaikh, Registrar SALU -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statement file by counsel for the petitioners, is taken on record. Learned Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition and submits that he may be allowed to file fresh. In view of above, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. However, petitioner is at liberty to file fresh, in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
